argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const rawData = window.rawData; if (!rawData) return []; const list = rawData?.stores?.store?.data?.ssrListData?.list || []; const results = []; for (const item of list) { if (!item.goodsID) continue; const tags = (item.tagList || []).map(t => t.text).filter(Boolean).join(','); results.push({ title: (item.goodsName || '').slice(0, 80), goods_id: String(item.goodsID), price: '¥' + (item.priceInfo || (item.price / 100).toFixed(2)), sales: item.salesTip || '', tags: tags, img_url: item.imgUrl || '', url: 'https://mobile.pinduoduo.com/' + (item.linkURL || 'goods.html?goods_id=' + item.goodsID) }); } return results; }

async (globalVars) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 10; const maxPages = 5; const data = globalVars.extractData || []; if (data.length >= limit) return false; globalVars.pageCount = (globalVars.pageCount || 0) + 1; if (globalVars.pageCount > maxPages) return false; const scrollHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight || document.body?.scrollHeight || 0; window.scrollTo(0, scrollHeight); return {pageCount: globalVars.pageCount}; }

(globalVars) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 10; const all = globalVars.extractData || []; const seen = new Set(); const deduped = []; for (const item of all) { if (!item.goods_id || seen.has(item.goods_id)) continue; seen.add(item.goods_id); deduped.push(item); } globalVars.extractData = deduped.slice(0, limit).map((item, i) => ({ ...item, rank: i + 1 })); return globalVars; }

description: 拼多多商品搜索（通过拦截 API 提取结果）
name: Search
